title: CSIR NIO – Project Associate - I – 1 Posts
shortInfo: CSIR - National Institute of Oceanography (CSIR-NIO) Recruitment 2026 for 1 Project Associate - I post. Candidates with MSc in Marine Biology, Zoology, Marine Science, or Oceanography with Biology specialization can apply online. The last date to submit the application is 31 May 2026 through the official CSIR-NIO website, nio.res.in.

basic_details.job_title: CSIR-NIO Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: CSIR - National Institute of Oceanography (CSIR-NIO) Recruitment 2026 for 1 Project Associate - I post. Candidates with MSc in Marine Biology, Zoology, Marine Science, or Oceanography with Biology specialization can apply online. The last date to submit the application is 31 May 2026 through the official CSIR-NIO website, nio.res.in.

qualification.education_qualification: MSc Marine Biology / Zoology/Marine Science(specialization in Biology)/Oceanography(specialization in Biology)

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR-NIO to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.
